failedAssertions.reason: On a fresh isolated stop-scan fixture, pressing `Re-scan` → `Start Scan` never exposed an accessible `Stop & Show Results` control before the scan completed with both `quick-project` and `zzzz-late-project` results, so the user cannot stop an active scan and keep partial results.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that WKWebView-backed Discover search fields may require Quartz `CGEventPostToPid(...)` to the Tauri app PID when direct `AXValue` updates do not trigger React `onChange`.
